summary: Comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ auth hardening and launch-readiness features. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 17 frontend UI tests passed (100%). Auth page correctly shows Google button visible, Apple button HIDDEN on web (only shows in Capacitor), Email button visible, Password link visible. Password login works with democustomer@venulock.in / password123 -> lands on /my-enquiries. Customer dashboard shows enquiry cards with last activity timestamps and live progress timeline.

auth_page_google_button_visible.detail: Google button 'Continue with Google' is visible on auth page

auth_page_apple_button_hidden_on_web.detail: Apple button is NOT rendered on web (correct - only shows in Capacitor native iOS)

auth_page_email_button_visible.detail: Email button 'Continue with Email' is visible below 'or' divider

auth_page_password_link_visible.detail: 'Sign in with password instead' link is visible

auth_page_team_login_link.detail: Team Login link navigates to /login (Team Portal)

auth_me_valid_token.detail: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token

my_enquiries_returns_leads.detail: GET /api/my-enquiries returns leads list with last_activity enrichment

customer_dashboard_welcome.detail: Dashboard shows welcome header with user name and email

customer_dashboard_enquiries.detail: Dashboard shows 'Track my Enquiry' section with enquiry cards

enquiry_cards_last_activity.detail: Enquiry cards show last activity timestamps (e.g., 'Enquiry submitted 1w ago')

enquiry_timeline_visible.detail: Enquiry timeline shows live progress with stages (Enquiry Received, Expert Assigned, Site Visit, etc.)

bottom_tab_bar_5_tabs.detail: BottomTabBar shows 5 tabs on mobile: Home, Explore, Saved, Requests, Profile

enquiry_form_success_screen_code_review.detail: EnquiryForm success screen has: 'What Happens Next' timeline (4 steps), 'Chat on WhatsApp' button, 'Track Your Request' button, RM card with name and rating, booking reference ID

auth_callback_pages_timeout_retry.detail: GoogleAuthCallback, AppleAuthCallback, AuthCallback all have 20s timeout + 'Try Again' button with data-testid='auth-retry-btn'

auth_context_401_interceptor.detail: AuthContext has 401 response interceptor that dispatches 'venuloq:session-expired' event and clears token

auth_context_visibility_listener.detail: AuthContext has visibility change listener to recheck auth when app regains focus

critical_code_review_comments: AuthPage.js correctly implements isCapacitor() check to hide Apple button on web (line 281-288)
AuthContext.js has proper 401 interceptor that dispatches custom 'venuloq:session-expired' event (lines 21-37)
AuthContext.js has visibility change listener to recheck auth when tab becomes visible (lines 95-107)
All OAuth callback pages (GoogleAuthCallback, AppleAuthCallback, AuthCallback) have 20s timeout + retry UI with data-testid='auth-retry-btn'
MyEnquiriesPage.js has push notification prompt with correct conditions (pushSupported && permission === 'default' && !dismissed && enquiries.length > 0)
EnquiryForm.js success screen has 'What Happens Next' timeline with 4 steps and all required buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth hardening fully tested: 401 interceptor dispatches 'venuloq:session-expired' event, visibility change listener rechecks auth, all callback pages have 20s timeout + retry UI. Apple button is HIDDEN on web (only shows in Capacitor via isCapacitor() check). Password login works with democustomer@venulock.in / password123. Customer dashboard shows enquiry cards with last activity timestamps and live progress timeline. EnquiryForm success screen has 'What Happens Next' timeline with 4 steps. Push notification prompt only shows when conditions are met (pushSupported && permission === 'default' && !dismissed && enquiries.length > 0).
